docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LI, RICH FOO SOO AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, RICH FOO SOO AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-09-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KIT WONG, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR, EXPERT. FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF RICH FOO SOO LI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. THE PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ASSISTIED BY HIS SON MIKE LI. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS NA ELECTRIC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KIT WONG CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR, EXPERT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, RICH FOO SOO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, PROPERTY DAMAGE $1500. EMOTIONAL DISTRESS $1000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
